description: CompositionGlossy dusty rose kurta made of a cotton-silk blend, has a round slit neckline, short sleeves, embroidery around the neckline, and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careUse mild detergentDo not dry in direct sunlightDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUse warm ironvishudh doodles with a classic blend of fabrics and heritage embroidery in this dusty rose kurta. It's created using a cotton-silk blend fabric to give it a heavy ethnic dose. Wear it on any occasion with a black churidar or leggings and chunky jewellery.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight: 5'7" Chest: 33"
